comment:
## Direction set

We are prioritizing a focused UX/visual refresh to improve writing flow clarity and comfort across Home, Stories, and Story Editor without adding new backend scope.

- Deliver a design brief that maps each target surface to specific hierarchy/label/layout improvements and grayscale-token-compliant visual updates.
- Include explicit interaction states (default/hover/active/focus), mobile + desktop behavior, and accessibility notes for readability (line length, type scale, contrast, focus mode behavior if proposed).
- Define success checks tied to acceptance criteria: modern/cohesive appearance, clearer navigation/mode discoverability, writer-comfort improvements.

Assign to: Design
